steps.title: Apply equal periods
steps.content: The passage explains that each TRAPPIST-1 planet has an orbital period equal to its rotational period. The example must use the table value for TRAPPIST-1e and repeat that value for rotation.

steps.title: Match the same value
steps.content: A gives unequal periods. B gives a value that is not TRAPPIST-1e's orbital period. D uses values tied to another planet. The correct completion states that TRAPPIST-1e's orbital and rotational periods are both 6.1 days. The answer is C.
